message:
feat(trace): reject scalar inputs during FFT/IFFT shape inference

Both infer_fft and infer_ifft previously allowed rank-0 (scalar) inputs
to pass through shape inference without error, producing nonsensical
output shapes. Add an explicit rank >= 1 guard that returns a
ShapeInferenceFailed error early, matching JAX's runtime behaviour.

Add tests:
- test_fft_rejects_scalar_input_shape_inference
- test_ifft_rejects_scalar_input_shape_inference

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
